news.title:
HDFC Securities highlights India's EMS sector growth, driven by PLI, China+1 strategy, and rising exports. Syrma SGS is its top pick with a target price of ₹920.
Dixon Tech gets 'Add' rating (₹10,740 target), Amber Enterprises 'Buy' (₹8,300 target), and Kaynes Technology 'Reduce' (₹3,810 target).
news.summary:
HDFC Securities highlights India's EMS sector growth, driven by PLI, China+1 strategy, and rising exports. Syrma SGS is its top pick with a target price of ₹920.
Dixon Tech gets 'Add' rating (₹10,740 target), Amber Enterprises 'Buy' (₹8,300 target), and Kaynes Technology 'Reduce' (₹3,810 target).

news.title:
EMS sector grows via PLI incentives, supply chain diversification.
Stocks in focus: Syrma, Dixon, Kaynes, Amber as per HDFC Securities.
news.summary:
EMS sector grows via PLI incentives, supply chain diversification.
Stocks in focus: Syrma, Dixon, Kaynes, Amber as per HDFC Securities.

news.title:
Experts recommend holding Asian Paints and Dixon Tech short-term, citing oil price impacts and ECMS competition.
Biocon, BSE, DAM Capital, and Titagarh Rail receive buy or hold advice with key price levels highlighted for potential gains.
news.summary:
Experts recommend holding Asian Paints and Dixon Tech short-term, citing oil price impacts and ECMS competition.
Biocon, BSE, DAM Capital, and Titagarh Rail receive buy or hold advice with key price levels highlighted for potential gains.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies announces institutional investor meetings, scheduled with Saturna Capital on April 6, 2026, and Aurum Equity on April 7, 2026.
The meetings will be in-person, one-on-one, with no unpublished price-sensitive information or presentations shared.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies announces institutional investor meetings, scheduled with Saturna Capital on April 6, 2026, and Aurum Equity on April 7, 2026.
The meetings will be in-person, one-on-one, with no unpublished price-sensitive information or presentations shared.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.

news.title:
Nomura maintains a 'buy' rating on Dixon Tech with a Rs 14,678 target, citing India's electronics push and PLI benefits.
Dixon's display projects could add Rs 4,000 crore EBITDA by FY28, with 100 bps margin boost from high-value components.
news.summary:
Nomura maintains a 'buy' rating on Dixon Tech with a Rs 14,678 target, citing India's electronics push and PLI benefits.
Dixon's display projects could add Rs 4,000 crore EBITDA by FY28, with 100 bps margin boost from high-value components.

news.title:
Dixon's Rs 1,100-cr display plant to begin trials in June.
The plant aims to achieve a production capacity of 84 million.
news.summary:
Dixon's Rs 1,100-cr display plant to begin trials in June.
The plant aims to achieve a production capacity of 84 million.

news.title: Dixon Tech aims for 40% value addition in components under ECMS.
news.summary: Dixon Tech aims for 40% value addition in components under ECMS.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies hits a 52-week low of Rs 9605.05 amid market slump.
Stock declines for the second session due to intensified selling pressure.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies hits a 52-week low of Rs 9605.05 amid market slump.
Stock declines for the second session due to intensified selling pressure.

news.title:
Dixon Tech plans to scale camera modules to 100M units annually, boosting value addition.
Display module production starting July could raise mobile value addition from 18% to 40%.
news.summary:
Dixon Tech plans to scale camera modules to 100M units annually, boosting value addition.
Display module production starting July could raise mobile value addition from 18% to 40%.

news.title:
MeitY approved 75 ECMS applications, attracting Rs 61,671 crore investments surpassing its Rs 59,350 crore target.
Key investors include Dixon (Rs 1,100 crore) and Syrma (Rs 588 crore), enhancing India's electronic component capabilities.
news.summary:
MeitY approved 75 ECMS applications, attracting Rs 61,671 crore investments surpassing its Rs 59,350 crore target.
Key investors include Dixon (Rs 1,100 crore) and Syrma (Rs 588 crore), enhancing India's electronic component capabilities.

news.title:
Dixon's subsidiary received ECMS approval for display module sub-assembly on March 30, 2026.
Focus on scaling liquid crystal and TFT LCD modules aligns with India's self-reliance push.
news.summary:
Dixon's subsidiary received ECMS approval for display module sub-assembly on March 30, 2026.
Focus on scaling liquid crystal and TFT LCD modules aligns with India's self-reliance push.

news.title: Dixon Technologies secures approval for a ₹100 crore project under the electronics component manufacturing scheme.
news.summary: Dixon Technologies secures approval for a ₹100 crore project under the electronics component manufacturing scheme.

news.title:
Dixon Tech received ₹1,100 Cr project approval under Electronics Component Scheme.
The approval aims to expand Dixon's electronics component manufacturing capacity.
news.summary:
Dixon Tech received ₹1,100 Cr project approval under Electronics Component Scheme.
The approval aims to expand Dixon's electronics component manufacturing capacity.

news.title:
Govt plans to recalibrate PLI 2.0 for IT hardware, focusing on AI servers and advanced components.
EMS players Syrma, Dixon, and Kaynes may benefit if policy aligns with industry expectations.
news.summary:
Govt plans to recalibrate PLI 2.0 for IT hardware, focusing on AI servers and advanced components.
EMS players Syrma, Dixon, and Kaynes may benefit if policy aligns with industry expectations.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies held investor meetings on 24th March 2026 with JM Financial and Enam Asset Management.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared during the meetings, as confirmed by the company.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies held investor meetings on 24th March 2026 with JM Financial and Enam Asset Management.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared during the meetings, as confirmed by the company.

news.title:
Dixon Tech projects strong mobile volume growth FY26e-28e via backward integration, new products, and exports.
The company plans to enter the industrial EMS space, boosting diversification efforts.
news.summary:
Dixon Tech projects strong mobile volume growth FY26e-28e via backward integration, new products, and exports.
The company plans to enter the industrial EMS space, boosting diversification efforts.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies expressed confidence at Investec Conference on Pn3 approval for Vivo JV.
Post approval, the JV may produce two-thirds of Vivo's 35M mobile sales in India.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies expressed confidence at Investec Conference on Pn3 approval for Vivo JV.
Post approval, the JV may produce two-thirds of Vivo's 35M mobile sales in India.

news.title:
Dixon Tech's management shared at Investec Conference that mobile demand is better than feared.
FY27e mobile volumes, excluding Vivo, are expected to match FY26e levels.
news.summary:
Dixon Tech's management shared at Investec Conference that mobile demand is better than feared.
FY27e mobile volumes, excluding Vivo, are expected to match FY26e levels.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies disclosed issuing a $10M guarantee for its subsidiary PEPL to Foxlink India Electric.
Guarantee is contingent liability; no immediate impact on Dixon's financials reported.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies disclosed issuing a $10M guarantee for its subsidiary PEPL to Foxlink India Electric.
Guarantee is contingent liability; no immediate impact on Dixon's financials reported.
